libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For generated native-test Gradle setup targeting io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 on JDK 25, add native runtime system properties equivalent to: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Tests can use Vertx.vertx(), a local HttpServer bound to 127.0.0.1 with port 0, and WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient against that server; no external service is needed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The public OAuth2WebClient API references the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency; only add io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2:5.0.1 if the generated test deliberately covers OAuth2-specific APIs.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether the Netty/JDK25 system properties are sufficient.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage is reachable with only an in-process Vert.x HTTP server; no Docker image or extra deterministic Maven dependency is required. However 5.0.1 still resolves Netty 4.2.x, and the existing 5.0.0 test setup documents that Netty 4.2.x needs explicit unsafe/reflection system properties for Java 25 native runs.
